subcodes.title: Words to Latimer and Remey, spoken on 1914-10-14
subcodes.first_line: The best method is to bury the body. Just as systematically as the body has grown into its present form, it has to be disintegrated.
subcodes.subjects: @law of burial and cremation, @existence; immortality of the human soul, @law of transformation and change, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
